case_title: HUNTER, STEVE et al vs. NIGOGHOSSIAN, MARILYN et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO APR-25-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

#1 CHOPPELA/NORMAN: C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY M DRESNER. DEFT M NIGOGHOSSIAN PRESENT, BUT HER ATTY R DAVIS IS IN HOSPITAL.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNTER, STEVE HUNTER, JAN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-21-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-28-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIGOGHOSSIAN, MARILYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1674 21ST AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED THRU 4-30-97 ON CONDITION PAYMENTS BE MADE TO PLTF STARTING 5-1-97 & 5-15-97; SEE JUDGMNT. IF PMTS NOT MADE W/IN 5 DAYS OF DUE DATE, PLTF MAY APPLY EX-PARTE UPON 48HRS NOTICE TO DEFT ATNY FOR POSSESSION AND ANY MONEY DUE. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS/FEES. SEE JUDGMNT FOR ALL TERMS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNTER, STEVE HUNTER, JAN AS TO DEFENDANT NIGOGHOSSIAN, MARILYN NIGOGHOSSIAN, BERDG DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED; JUDGMENT SUBMITTED BY PLTF.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NIGOGHOSSIAN, MARILYN
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT NIGOGHOSSIAN, MARILYN

DEPT 1/JUDGE CHOPPELAS/REPORTER:S.SAWYER/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SPECAILLY SET SETTLEMENT CONF @10AM. PLTF ATNY M.DRESNER PRESENT. DEFT COUNSEL R.DAVIS IS IN THE HOSPITAL FOLLOWING AN INJURY. DAVIS AND SIGNED BY THE DEFENDANT WITH STATEMENT AGREEING TO TERMS & CONDS. THE COURT ACCEPTS THE SIGNED JUDGMNT AS A PROPER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES.
